title: Bird flu: licence to move eggs (and egg waste) to a protection or surveillance zone for disposal at an approved animal by-product plant (EXD653(HPAI)(EW))
body: "Use this licence to move eggs (and egg waste) from premises outside a protection zone or surveillance zone to an approved animal by-product plant in a protection zone or surveillance zone in England or Wales for disposal.   This licence can only be used in England or Wales. "
